title: About Interview Me
subtitle: The AI-powered platform that connects professionals and companies — smarter, faster, 24/7.

what.title: What is Interview Me?
what.description: Interview Me is a platform that uses AI to transform how hiring works — for both sides. Professionals create smart profiles with an AI chat that answers recruiters' questions automatically. Companies post jobs, discover talent, and pre-screen candidates through AI-powered conversations — all before scheduling a single call.

how.title: How It Works
how.step1Desc: Add your experience, education, projects, skills and stories. The more detail you provide, the better the AI represents you.
how.step2Desc: Get a public profile URL like /p/your-name. Share it with recruiters, on LinkedIn, or in job applications.
how.step3Desc: Recruiters visit your profile and chat with the AI to learn about your background — before even scheduling a call.

howCompany.title: How It Works for Companies
howCompany.step1Desc: Create a company account with your profile, sector, and description. Set up your hiring presence in minutes.
howCompany.step2Desc: Publish open positions and browse professional profiles. Use AI chat to pre-screen candidates instantly.
howCompany.step3Desc: Review AI-powered conversation insights, shortlist candidates, and schedule interviews only with the best matches.

forRecruiters.title: For Recruiters
forRecruiters.description: Imagine being able to pre-screen candidates by chatting with an AI that knows their full background. No more reading through lengthy resumes — just ask what you need to know.
forRecruiters.bullet1: Pre-screen candidates in minutes, not hours
forRecruiters.bullet2: Ask specific questions about skills and experience
forRecruiters.bullet3: Get answers grounded in the candidate's real data

forProfessionals.title: For Professionals
forProfessionals.description: Stand out from the crowd. Instead of sending a static resume, share a living profile that can answer questions about your career 24/7.
forProfessionals.bullet2: AI handles preliminary interviews for you
forProfessionals.bullet3: Track who visits and what they ask

forCompanies.title: For Companies
forCompanies.description: Streamline your hiring pipeline. Post jobs, discover professionals, and let AI handle the first round of screening — saving your team hours of manual work.
forCompanies.bullet1: Post jobs and attract qualified candidates
forCompanies.bullet2: Pre-screen via AI chat on candidate profiles
forCompanies.bullet3: Company dashboard with metrics: jobs, candidates, views
forCompanies.bullet4: Build your employer brand with a company profile

cta.title: Ready to try?
cta.description: Create your profile in minutes and start sharing your smart career link.
